rows.label: tlk47100161_01_msg0001
rows.name:
Rex-niichan's salvaging
is so cool! I love it!

rows.label: tlk47100161_01_msg0002
rows.name:
I want to be a salvager when
I grow up! Except... I can't
really swim.

rows.label: tlk47100161_01_msg0003
rows.name:
Auntie Correl said you can do
anything if you try hard, so
I'll keep trying!
